announcements.title: Spring 2025 Course Registration Closes
announcements.excerpt: All students must complete their Spring 2025 course registration by the end of this week. Late registrations will incur an administrative fee of $150. Contact your academic advisor for exceptions.

announcements.title: Annual Science & Technology Symposium
announcements.excerpt: Join us for the 18th Annual S&T Symposium featuring keynote speakers from MIT and Stanford. Workshops on AI, Quantum Computing, and Biotech. Open to all students and faculty.

announcements.title: Mid-Term Examination Schedule Published
announcements.excerpt: The mid-term examination schedule for all undergraduate and postgraduate programs has been published. Students are advised to check the student portal and plan accordingly.

announcements.title: Library Extended Hours During Exam Period
announcements.excerpt: The Northbridge University Library will extend its operating hours to 24/7 starting March 14 through April 5 to support students during the mid-term examination period.

announcements.title: Graduate Research Grant Applications Open
announcements.excerpt: Applications for the 2025–2026 Graduate Research Grant are now open. Grants of up to $8,000 are available for doctoral candidates. Deadline for submission is April 30, 2025.

announcements.title: Career Fair – Spring Edition
announcements.excerpt: Over 80 companies including Google, Microsoft, Deloitte and local startups will be present at the Spring Career Fair. Bring printed CVs and dress professionally. Free shuttle from campus gates.
